3080540.name: Drunken Dragon
3080540.description:
Welcome to the Drunken Dragon!

Step into the lively world of the Drunken Dragon Inn, where fantasy meets great cooking! In this fun tavern simulator, you are the innkeeper, managing every part of your tavern. From managing resources to mastering cooking, every decision you make helps your tavern succeed.




  • Keep your pantry full of fresh ingredients and your cellars stocked with the best ales and wines to make sure your customers are happy.
  • Modify your Menu to match the ingredients you have on hand




  • Enjoy hands-on cooking where you pick ingredients, make meals, and cook meat on a firepit. Unlock new recipes to keep your menu interesting.
  • You have to work with a numerous recipes of soups and meat and also a variety of drinks.


  • Earn gold from happy customers and use it to improve your inn. Expand your menu, upgrade your kitchen, and make your tavern more attractive to get more important guests.
  • Gain ingredients.
  • Unlock recipes
  • Buy different upgrades for a Tavern and for yourself


Keep your inn clean and welcoming. Cleaning tables, and keeping the decor nice are just as important as serving food and drinks.


Why Choose Drunken Dragon Inn?

Enjoy hands-on cooking, from picking the perfect ingredients to grilling and brewing. Every action you take, whether it’s making a new dish or serving a great drink, helps your tavern succeed.

Release Date:

Drunken Dragon Inn will be released at the end of 2024. Wishlist now to stay updated and be among the first to enjoy the magic of the Drunken Dragon Inn!
